generated_exposure.exposure_text: I get why some folks worry about expanding security powers, but let's be real - we've seen what happens when we're not prepared. Remember the 2024 cyber attacks? That could've been so much worse if agencies didn't have the tools they needed. We can't afford to be naive about security in 2026. It's not about giving up freedoms, it's about being smart. #SecurityMatters #PreparedNotParanoid
